{{nihongo|'''Takinami Shrine'''|瀧浪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]].

It is located in [[Kaga Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Q134917287|lt=Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|ja|加賀国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11399659}} ** Series ordinal: 18 ** P155: {{ill|Q109665899|lt=Q109665899|WD=Q109665899}} ** P156: {{ill|Kumatano Shrine|lt=Kumatano Shrine|WD=Q135040276}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q907469|lt=Q907469|WD=Q907469}} * {{ill|Q646898|lt=Q646898|WD=Q646898}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|36.370217|136.496876}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182319 == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|lt=Q11071125|WD=Q11071125}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * Shrine|lt=Takinamino Shrine|WD=Q135040275}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} [[JA:瀧浪神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135194767}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=瀧浪神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|小松市|Q646898}}大野町イキツキ5番地7、6番地3合併 |祭神=多幾里比咩命
{{jalink|天照皇大神}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{jalink|式内社}}（小社） |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''瀧浪神社'''（たきなみじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|小松市|Q646898}}大野町にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|多幾里比咩命}} *{{jalink|天照皇大神}} - 元は当社に合祀した笠縫神社の祭神。 === 由緒 === {{jalink|延喜式|Q1342448}}には多伎奈弥神社と記載され、滝宮とも称される。{{jalink|醍醐天皇|Q329753}}{{jalink|延喜|Q1374325}}11年（{{jalink|911年|Q24062}}）{{jalink|従四位下}}を授けられる[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ 滝浪神社] - 石川県神社庁。 {{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}16年（{{jalink|1639年|Q6897}}）、{{jalink|前田利常|Q587204}}公が{{jalink|小松城|Q11461063}}に隠居する際に、厚く当社を崇敬し祀堂を建立した。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}39年（{{jalink|1906年|Q2049}}）12月29日神饌幣帛料供進神社に指定になる。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}41年（{{jalink|1908年|Q2056}}）3月13日笠縫神社（橋爪谷六番地）を合祀する。当社が山上にあったことより、参拝に不便であるとの理由から{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}17年（{{jalink|1942年|Q18625}}）11月28日本殿幣殿拝殿を現社地に改築する[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm 瀧浪神社] - 玄松子。 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]]

{{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|ja|加賀国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11399659}} ** Series ordinal: 18 ** P155: {{ill|Q109665899|lt=Q109665899|WD=Q109665899}} ** P156: {{ill|Kumatano Shrine|lt=Kumatano Shrine|WD=Q135040276}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182319 == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|lt=Q11071125|WD=Q11071125}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q11123280|lt=Q11123280|WD=Q11123280}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|lt=Q17|WD=Q17}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Takinamino Shrine|lt=Takinamino Shrine|WD=Q135040275}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} [[JA:瀧浪神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135194767}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=瀧浪神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|小松市|Q646898}}大野町イキツキ5番地7、6番地3合併 |祭神=多幾里比咩命
{{jalink|天照皇大神}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{jalink|式内社}}（小社） |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''瀧浪神社'''（たきなみじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|小松市|Q646898}}大野町にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|多幾里比咩命}} *{{jalink|天照皇大神}} - 元は当社に合祀した笠縫神社の祭神。 === 由緒 === {{jalink|延喜式|Q1342448}}には多伎奈弥神社と記載され、滝宮とも称される。{{jalink|醍醐天皇|Q329753}}{{jalink|延喜|Q1374325}}11年（{{jalink|911年|Q24062}}）{{jalink|従四位下}}を授けられる[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ 滝浪神社] - 石川県神社庁。 {{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}16年（{{jalink|1639年|Q6897}}）、{{jalink|前田利常|Q587204}}公が{{jalink|小松城|Q11461063}}に隠居する際に、厚く当社を崇敬し祀堂を建立した。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}39年（{{jalink|1906年|Q2049}}）12月29日神饌幣帛料供進神社に指定になる。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}41年（{{jalink|1908年|Q2056}}）3月13日笠縫神社（橋爪谷六番地）を合祀する。当社が山上にあったことより、参拝に不便であるとの理由から{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}17年（{{jalink|1942年|Q18625}}）11月28日本殿幣殿拝殿を現社地に改築する[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm 瀧浪神社] - 玄松子。 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{jalink|天照皇大神}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{jalink|式内社}}（小社） |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=三輪神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''瀧浪神社'''（たきなみじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|石川県|Q131281}}{{jalink|小松市|Q646898}}大野町にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|多幾里比咩命}} *{{jalink|天照皇大神}} - 元は当社に合祀した笠縫神社の祭神。 === 由緒 === {{jalink|延喜式|Q1342448}}には多伎奈弥神社と記載され、滝宮とも称される。{{jalink|醍醐天皇|Q329753}}{{jalink|延喜|Q1374325}}11年（{{jalink|911年|Q24062}}）{{jalink|従四位下}}を授けられる[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ 滝浪神社] - 石川県神社庁。 {{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}16年（{{jalink|1639年|Q6897}}）、{{jalink|前田利常|Q587204}}公が{{jalink|小松城|Q11461063}}に隠居する際に、厚く当社を崇敬し祀堂を建立した。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}39年（{{jalink|1906年|Q2049}}）12月29日神饌幣帛料供進神社に指定になる。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}41年（{{jalink|1908年|Q2056}}）3月13日笠縫神社（橋爪谷六番地）を合祀する。当社が山上にあったことより、参拝に不便であるとの理由から{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}17年（{{jalink|1942年|Q18625}}）11月28日本殿幣殿拝殿を現社地に改築する[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm 瀧浪神社] - 玄松子。 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

It is located in [[Kaga Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Q134917287|lt=Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|ja|加賀国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11399659}} ** Series ordinal: 18 ** P155: {{ill|Q109665899|lt=Q109665899|WD=Q109665899}} ** P156: {{ill|Kumatano Shrine|lt=Kumatano Shrine|WD=Q135040276}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q907469|lt=Q907469|WD=Q907469}} * {{ill|Q646898|lt=Q646898|WD=Q646898}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|36.370217|136.496876}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182319 == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|lt=Q11071125|WD=Q11071125}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q11123280|lt=Q11123280|WD=Q11123280}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|lt=Q17|WD=Q17}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Takinamino Shrine|lt=Takinamino Shrine|WD=Q135040275}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} [[JA:瀧浪神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135194767}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Takinami Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}} {{jalink|Komatsu|Q646898}} Ōno-machi Ikitsuki 5-7, 6-3 (merged lots) |祭神=Takirihime no Mikoto
{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small shrine) |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takinami Shrine''' (たきなみじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} located in Ōno-machi, {{jalink|Komatsu|Q646898}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Takirihime no Mikoto}} *{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami}} - Originally the enshrined deity of Kasanui Shrine, which was merged into this shrine. === History === The shrine is listed as Takinami Shrine (多伎奈弥神社) in the {{jalink|Engishiki|Q1342448}}, and is also known as Takimiya. In the 11th year of {{jalink|Engi|Q1374325}} ({{jalink|911|Q24062}}) under {{jalink|Emperor Daigo|Q329753}}, it was conferred the rank of {{jalink|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}}[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ Takinami Shrine] - Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Agency. In the 16th year of {{jalink|Kan'ei|Q1192913}} ({{jalink|1639|Q6897}}), when Lord {{jalink|Maeda Toshitsune|Q587204}} retired to {{jalink|Komatsu Castle|Q11461063}}, he deeply revered this shrine and erected a worship hall. On December 29, {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 39 ({{jalink|1906|Q2049}}), the shrine was designated as a shinsen heihakuryō kyōshin shrine. On March 13, {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 41 ({{jalink|1908|Q2056}}), Kasanui Shrine (Hashizume-tani lot 6) was merged into this shrine. Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 17 ({{jalink|1942|Q18625}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{Expand Japanese|瀧浪神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Takinami Shrine | native_name = 瀧浪神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Takinami Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|36.370217|136.496876}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Takinami Shrine'''|瀧浪神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Q134917287|lt=Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|ja|加賀国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11399659}} ** Series ordinal: 18 ** P155: {{ill|Q109665899|lt=Q109665899|WD=Q109665899}} ** P156: {{ill|Kumatano Shrine|lt=Kumatano Shrine|WD=Q135040276}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q907469|lt=Q907469|WD=Q907469}} * {{ill|Q646898|lt=Q646898|WD=Q646898}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|36.370217|136.496876}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182319 == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|lt=Q11071125|WD=Q11071125}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q11123280|lt=Q11123280|WD=Q11123280}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|lt=Q17|WD=Q17}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Takinamino Shrine|lt=Takinamino Shrine|WD=Q135040275}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} [[JA:瀧浪神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135194767}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Takinami Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}} {{jalink|Komatsu|Q646898}} Ōno-machi Ikitsuki 5-7, 6-3 (merged lots) |祭神=Takirihime no Mikoto
{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small shrine) |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takinami Shrine''' (たきなみじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} located in Ōno-machi, {{jalink|Komatsu|Q646898}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Takirihime no Mikoto}} *{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami}} - Originally the enshrined deity of Kasanui Shrine, which was merged into this shrine. === History === The shrine is listed as Takinami Shrine (多伎奈弥神社) in the {{jalink|Engishiki|Q1342448}}, and is also known as Takimiya. In the 11th year of {{jalink|Engi|Q1374325}} ({{jalink|911|Q24062}}) under {{jalink|Emperor Daigo|Q329753}}, it was conferred the rank of {{jalink|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}}[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ Takinami Shrine] - Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Agency. In the 16th year of {{jalink|Kan'ei|Q1192913}} ({{jalink|1639|Q6897}}), when Lord {{jalink|Maeda Toshitsune|Q587204}} retired to {{jalink|Komatsu Castle|Q11461063}}, he deeply revered this shrine and erected a worship hall. On December 29, {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 39 ({{jalink|1906|Q2049}}), the shrine was designated as a shinsen heihakuryō kyōshin shrine. On March 13, {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 41 ({{jalink|1908|Q2056}}), Kasanui Shrine (Hashizume-tani lot 6) was merged into this shrine. Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 17 ({{jalink|1942|Q18625}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

|画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}} {{jalink|Komatsu|Q646898}} Ōno-machi Ikitsuki 5-7, 6-3 (merged lots) |祭神=Takirihime no Mikoto
{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small shrine) |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takinami Shrine''' (たきなみじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} located in Ōno-machi, {{jalink|Komatsu|Q646898}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Takirihime no Mikoto}} *{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami}} - Originally the enshrined deity of Kasanui Shrine, which was merged into this shrine. === History === The shrine is listed as Takinami Shrine (多伎奈弥神社) in the {{jalink|Engishiki|Q1342448}}, and is also known as Takimiya. In the 11th year of {{jalink|Engi|Q1374325}} ({{jalink|911|Q24062}}) under {{jalink|Emperor Daigo|Q329753}}, it was conferred the rank of {{jalink|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}}[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ Takinami Shrine] - Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Agency. In the 16th year of {{jalink|Kan'ei|Q1192913}} ({{jalink|1639|Q6897}}), when Lord {{jalink|Maeda Toshitsune|Q587204}} retired to {{jalink|Komatsu Castle|Q11461063}}, he deeply revered this shrine and erected a worship hall. On December 29, {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 39 ({{jalink|1906|Q2049}}), the shrine was designated as a shinsen heihakuryō kyōshin shrine. On March 13, {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 41 ({{jalink|1908|Q2056}}), Kasanui Shrine (Hashizume-tani lot 6) was merged into this shrine. Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 17 ({{jalink|1942|Q18625}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]]

{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (small shrine) |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takinami Shrine''' (たきなみじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} located in Ōno-machi, {{jalink|Komatsu|Q646898}}, {{jalink|Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Takirihime no Mikoto}} *{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami}} - Originally the enshrined deity of Kasanui Shrine, which was merged into this shrine. === History === The shrine is listed as Takinami Shrine (多伎奈弥神社) in the {{jalink|Engishiki|Q1342448}}, and is also known as Takimiya. In the 11th year of {{jalink|Engi|Q1374325}} ({{jalink|911|Q24062}}) under {{jalink|Emperor Daigo|Q329753}}, it was conferred the rank of {{jalink|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade}}[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ Takinami Shrine] - Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Agency. In the 16th year of {{jalink|Kan'ei|Q1192913}} ({{jalink|1639|Q6897}}), when Lord {{jalink|Maeda Toshitsune|Q587204}} retired to {{jalink|Komatsu Castle|Q11461063}}, he deeply revered this shrine and erected a worship hall. On December 29, {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 39 ({{jalink|1906|Q2049}}), the shrine was designated as a shinsen heihakuryō kyōshin shrine. On March 13, {{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 41 ({{jalink|1908|Q2056}}), Kasanui Shrine (Hashizume-tani lot 6) was merged into this shrine. Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 17 ({{jalink|1942|Q18625}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567}} 17 ({{ill|lt=1942|Q18625|WD=Q18625}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

|画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}} {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898}} Ōno-machi Ikitsuki 5-7, 6-3 (merged lots) |祭神=Takirihime no Mikoto
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=UNKNOWN}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (small shrine) |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takinami Shrine''' (たきなみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in Ōno-machi, {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takirihime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=UNKNOWN}} - Originally the enshrined deity of Kasanui Shrine, which was merged into this shrine. === History === The shrine is listed as Takinami Shrine (多伎奈弥神社) in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448}}, and is also known as Takimiya. In the 11th year of {{ill|lt=Engi|Q1374325|WD=Q1374325}} ({{ill|lt=911|Q24062|WD=Q24062}}) under {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753}}, it was conferred the rank of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ Takinami Shrine] - Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Agency. In the 16th year of {{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913}} ({{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897}}), when Lord {{ill|lt=Maeda Toshitsune|Q587204|WD=Q587204}} retired to {{ill|lt=Komatsu Castle|Q11461063|WD=Q11461063}}, he deeply revered this shrine and erected a worship hall. On December 29, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 39 ({{ill|lt=1906|Q2049|WD=Q2049}}), the shrine was designated as a shinsen heihakuryō kyōshin shrine. On March 13, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 41 ({{ill|lt=1908|Q2056|WD=Q2056}}), Kasanui Shrine (Hashizume-tani lot 6) was merged into this shrine. Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567}} 17 ({{ill|lt=1942|Q18625|WD=Q18625}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} [[JA:瀧浪神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135194767}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Takinami Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}} {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}} Ōno-machi Ikitsuki 5-7, 6-3 (merged lots) |祭神=Takirihime no Mikoto
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (small shrine) |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takinami Shrine''' (たきなみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Ōno-machi, {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takirihime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}} - Originally the enshrined deity of Kasanui Shrine, which was merged into this shrine. === History === The shrine is listed as Takinami Shrine (多伎奈弥神社) in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}, and is also known as Takimiya. In the 11th year of {{ill|lt=Engi|Q1374325|WD=Q1374325|1=Engi (era)}} ({{ill|lt=911|Q24062|WD=Q24062|1=AD 911}}) under {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was conferred the rank of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ Takinami Shrine] - Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Agency. In the 16th year of {{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} ({{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897|1=1639}}), when Lord {{ill|lt=Maeda Toshitsune|Q587204|WD=Q587204|1=Maeda Toshitsune}} retired to {{ill|lt=Komatsu Castle|Q11461063|WD=Q11461063|1=Komatsu Castle}}, he deeply revered this shrine and erected a worship hall. On December 29, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 39 ({{ill|lt=1906|Q2049|WD=Q2049|1=1906}}), the shrine was designated as a shinsen heihakuryō kyōshin shrine. On March 13, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 41 ({{ill|lt=1908|Q2056|WD=Q2056|1=1908}}), Kasanui Shrine (Hashizume-tani lot 6) was merged into this shrine. Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 17 ({{ill|lt=1942|Q18625|WD=Q18625|1=1942}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たきなみしんしや}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} [[JA:瀧浪神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135194767}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Takinami Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}} {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}} Ōno-machi Ikitsuki 5-7, 6-3 (merged lots) |祭神=Takirihime no Mikoto
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (small shrine) |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takinami Shrine''' (たきなみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Ōno-machi, {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takirihime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}} - Originally the enshrined deity of Kasanui Shrine, which was merged into this shrine. === History === The shrine is listed as Takinami Shrine (多伎奈弥神社) in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}, and is also known as Takimiya. In the 11th year of {{ill|lt=Engi|Q1374325|WD=Q1374325|1=Engi (era)}} ({{ill|lt=911|Q24062|WD=Q24062|1=AD 911}}) under {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was conferred the rank of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ Takinami Shrine] - Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Agency. In the 16th year of {{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} ({{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897|1=1639}}), when Lord {{ill|lt=Maeda Toshitsune|Q587204|WD=Q587204|1=Maeda Toshitsune}} retired to {{ill|lt=Komatsu Castle|Q11461063|WD=Q11461063|1=Komatsu Castle}}, he deeply revered this shrine and erected a worship hall. On December 29, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 39 ({{ill|lt=1906|Q2049|WD=Q2049|1=1906}}), the shrine was designated as a shinsen heihakuryō kyōshin shrine. On March 13, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 41 ({{ill|lt=1908|Q2056|WD=Q2056|1=1908}}), Kasanui Shrine (Hashizume-tani lot 6) was merged into this shrine. Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 17 ({{ill|lt=1942|Q18625|WD=Q18625|1=1942}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:加賀国の式内社]] [[Category:小松市の歴史]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]][[Category:qq]]

(P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province|ja|加賀国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11399659|1=List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province}} ** Series ordinal: 18 ** P155: {{ill|Q109665899|ltq=Q109665899|WD=Q109665899|1=Uhashi Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Kumatano Shrine|lt=Kumatano Shrine|WD=Q135040276|1=Kumatano Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q907469|ltq=Q907469|WD=Q907469|1=Kaga Province}} * {{ill|Q646898|ltq=Q646898|WD=Q646898|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|WD=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q11123280|ltq=Q11123280|WD=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|WD=Q17|1=Japan}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Takinamino Shrine|lt=Takinamino Shrine|WD=Q135040275|1=Takinamino Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} [[JA:瀧浪神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135194767}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Takinami Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}} {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}} Ōno-machi Ikitsuki 5-7, 6-3 (merged lots) |祭神=Takirihime no Mikoto
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (small shrine) |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takinami Shrine''' (たきなみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Ōno-machi, {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takirihime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}} - Originally the enshrined deity of Kasanui Shrine, which was merged into this shrine. === History === The shrine is listed as Takinami Shrine (多伎奈弥神社) in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}, and is also known as Takimiya. In the 11th year of {{ill|lt=Engi|Q1374325|WD=Q1374325|1=Engi (era)}} ({{ill|lt=911|Q24062|WD=Q24062|1=AD 911}}) under {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was conferred the rank of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ Takinami Shrine] - Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Agency. In the 16th year of {{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} ({{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897|1=1639}}), when Lord {{ill|lt=Maeda Toshitsune|Q587204|WD=Q587204|1=Maeda Toshitsune}} retired to {{ill|lt=Komatsu Castle|Q11461063|WD=Q11461063|1=Komatsu Castle}}, he deeply revered this shrine and erected a worship hall. On December 29, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 39 ({{ill|lt=1906|Q2049|WD=Q2049|1=1906}}), the shrine was designated as a shinsen heihakuryō kyōshin shrine. On March 13, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 41 ({{ill|lt=1908|Q2056|WD=Q2056|1=1908}}), Kasanui Shrine (Hashizume-tani lot 6) was merged into this shrine. Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 17 ({{ill|lt=1942|Q18625|WD=Q18625|1=1942}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:石川県の神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:History of Komatsu, Ishikawa]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]]

{{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} [[JA:瀧浪神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135194767}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Takinami Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=小松市}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}} {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}} Ōno-machi Ikitsuki 5-7, 6-3 (merged lots) |祭神=Takirihime no Mikoto
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}} |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (small shrine) |地図= {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=Miwa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Takinami Shrine''' (たきなみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Ōno-machi, {{ill|lt=Komatsu|Q646898|WD=Q646898|1=Komatsu, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|WD=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takirihime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|WD=Q455602}} - Originally the enshrined deity of Kasanui Shrine, which was merged into this shrine. === History === The shrine is listed as Takinami Shrine (多伎奈弥神社) in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|WD=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}, and is also known as Takimiya. In the 11th year of {{ill|lt=Engi|Q1374325|WD=Q1374325|1=Engi (era)}} ({{ill|lt=911|Q24062|WD=Q24062|1=AD 911}}) under {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was conferred the rank of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j0561/ Takinami Shrine] - Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Agency. In the 16th year of {{ill|lt=Kan'ei|Q1192913|WD=Q1192913|1=Kan'ei}} ({{ill|lt=1639|Q6897|WD=Q6897|1=1639}}), when Lord {{ill|lt=Maeda Toshitsune|Q587204|WD=Q587204|1=Maeda Toshitsune}} retired to {{ill|lt=Komatsu Castle|Q11461063|WD=Q11461063|1=Komatsu Castle}}, he deeply revered this shrine and erected a worship hall. On December 29, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 39 ({{ill|lt=1906|Q2049|WD=Q2049|1=1906}}), the shrine was designated as a shinsen heihakuryō kyōshin shrine. On March 13, {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 41 ({{ill|lt=1908|Q2056|WD=Q2056|1=1908}}), Kasanui Shrine (Hashizume-tani lot 6) was merged into this shrine. Because the shrine was originally located on a mountaintop and therefore inconvenient for worship, on November 28, {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 17 ({{ill|lt=1942|Q18625|WD=Q18625|1=1942}}), the main hall, offering hall, and worship hall were rebuilt at the current shrine grounds[https://www.genbu.net/data/kaga/takinami_title.htm Takinami Shrine] - Genbu. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-stub|pref=石川県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takinami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:History of Komatsu, Ishikawa]] [[Category:小松市の建築物]]
